14.anchor: “My sins have been bound into a yoke
14.note: Most Hebrew manuscripts; many Hebrew manuscripts and Septuagint He kept watch over my sins

15.note: Or has set a time for me / when he will

1.anchor: with the cloud of his anger
1.note: Or How the Lord in his anger / has treated Daughter Zion with contempt

3.note: Or off / all the strength every king
